title: Spicy Light Nostalgic Uruguayan Capsicum Annuum Stir-fry
description: A light and nostalgic Uruguayan dish featuring panang curry paste in a spicy air-fried version, perfect for any meal.
instructions: Place the capsicum annuum slices on a baking sheet.
Drizzle with air fryer oil spray and sprinkle lightly with salt. Air-fry for about 10 minutes, flipping halfway through.
In a wok or large skillet, heat 2 tablespoons of your favorite cooking oil over medium-high heat. Add the finely chopped onion and sauté until translucent.
Add minced garlic and red pepper (if using), cook for an additional minute until fragrant.
Toss in sliced capsicum annuum from air-frying, add diced tomatoes, and stir to combine all ingredients evenly. Season with turmeric powder and a pinch of chili powder for extra heat. Mix well.
Cook for about 3-4 minutes or until the vegetables are tender-crisp but still retaining their crunch. Adjust seasoning if necessary.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
